item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
## Odak 0.1.0 — first public preview
Odak is a project finder and window switcher for macOS developers. This is an early preview — core features work, but rough edges remain.
### What's here - Global hotkey project finder with instant fuzzy search across your code folders - Window switcher with MRU ordering across apps and same-app windows - Settings with customizable shortcuts, accent palette, and row density - 14-day trial — license activation goes live once Paddle is set up
### Known limits - No in-app purchase yet (license server still being stood up) - Built for macOS 26+ only
Feedback welcome at support@odak.fyi.
